Package com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.property.readonly

Class ReadOnlyLongProperty

java.lang.Object
com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.property.readonly.ReadOnlyNumberProperty
com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.property.readonly.ReadOnlyLongProperty
All Implemented Interfaces:
Observable, ObservableValue<Number>, ReadOnlyProperty<Number>, ObservableLongValue, ObservableNumberValue
Direct Known Subclasses:
LongProperty
public class ReadOnlyLongProperty extends ReadOnlyNumberProperty implements ObservableLongValue
